audio_01.agent_summary: TRIBE v2 cortical trajectory: 6 timesteps (TR=1.49s), peak at t=1. Dominant macro groups at peak: Motor (0.47), Auditory (0.46), Language (0.19). fMRI predictions averaged over Yeo 7-network parcellation; hemodynamic lag (~5s) already compensated by TRIBE.
